ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the wine is produced */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the wine is produced */,
  "region_1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first region where the wine is produced */,
  "region_2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second region where the wine is produced */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winery that produced the wine */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety of the wine */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Year the wine was produced (vintage) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Full title of the wine */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation or special designation of the wine */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Rating of the wine (out of 100) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the wine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the wine's characteristics and tasting notes */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taster who reviewed the wine */,
  "taster_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the taster */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the wine bottle */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was produced */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the wine bottle image */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the wine is organic */,
  "is_biodynamic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the wine is biodynamic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_2_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES tasters ("taster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery_id FOREIGN KEY ("winery_id") REFERENCES wineries ("winery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_1_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the province is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the province */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the region is located */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wineries" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the winery is located */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the winery is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the winery is located */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the winery was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the winery's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the winery */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the winery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "grape_type" TEXT /* Type of grape used */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the grape variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasters" (
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taster */,
  "taster_name" TEXT /* Name of the taster */,
  "taster_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the taster */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the taster */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the taster's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the taster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_variety" (
  "wine_variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine-variety relationship */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety */,
  "variety_numerical" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the variety */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the variety in the wine blend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_variety_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_variety_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wine in stock */,
  "stock_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was stocked */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storage location */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the wine in months */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wine sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the wine was sold */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, retail, wholesale) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Customer's loyalty points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
